CustomObject.description:
Before a record is inserted or / and updated (depending on the metadata settings) values from parent (source) object is populate to child (target) object.
If the value on the Target Object changes, the Child record will not update automatically. It only updates if it is manually edited. So this function is typically used to freeze a certain value on a child object at the time a record is created or / and updated.
Example: Save the current timekeeper cost center on a time record at creation.
CustomObject.label: Inherited field value
